hero.sub: We design, build, and deploy AI agents that integrate with your ERP, automate processes, and bring real intelligence to your operation. Applied engineering, in production, from Monterrey.

services.label: WHAT WE DO
services.title: Diagnostics, automation, custom development, and training.

items.title: Diagnostics
items.body: We evaluate your full operation: processes, systems, bottlenecks, and real automation opportunities. We deliver a prioritized action map.

items.title: Process automation
items.body: We design and deploy automated workflows that connect your systems, eliminate repetitive manual work, and run 24/7 in production.

items.title: Custom development
items.body: We build software, agents, and integrations specific to your operation: from ERP connectors to intelligent query systems with AI.

items.title: Training
items.body: We train your team to understand, operate, and extend the tools we implement. Client autonomy is part of the deliverable.

problems.label: THE STARTING POINT
problems.title: Does any of this sound familiar?

items.title: My ERP doesn't connect to anything
items.body: We integrate SAP, CONTPAQi, Microsip, and any API with automated workflows. No manual intervention, no fragile glue code.

items.title: I have data but I can't use it
items.body: We build pipelines and RAG agents that turn documents, databases, and historical records into queryable knowledge in real time.

items.title: We lose hours to manual processes
items.body: We deploy operational agents that execute tasks, verify conditions, and escalate exceptions. With full observability from day one.

method.label: THE METHOD
method.title: Closed scope. Defined deliverable. Fixed price.
method.lead: Every project starts with a diagnostic study. We know exactly what we will deliver, in how much time, and at what cost — before writing the first line of code.

items.title: Our own hardware
items.body: Rack with 4 GPUs and 30 GB VRAM in Monterrey. Local inference for the models that allow it. Your data stays on your infrastructure.

items.title: Closed scope from day zero
items.body: Every engagement starts with a study: concrete deliverable, defined time, fixed price. No scope surprises halfway through.

items.title: In production from day one
items.body: Everything we build operates in production: monitoring, alerts, and observability are included in every deployment.

stack.label: OPEN SOURCE ECOSYSTEM
stack.lead: We build on the best open source projects in the ecosystem.

booking.title: Ready to automate your operation?
booking.sub: Tell us about your operation and pick a time. We will follow up to confirm the details.

form.title: Book a session
form.name: Name
form.reasonPlaceholder: What would you like to discuss?
form.successSub: We will review your request and follow up by email to confirm your appointment.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
form.errorUpstream: We couldn't reach our scheduling system. Please try again in a moment, or email us directly.
